displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #46: The Dreams of Cody Sunn-Childe
synopsis: While Lando Calrissian and Chewbacca race to rescue Han Solo, the *Millennium Falcon* suffers a hyperspace malfunction that drops them into another dimension. There they find a mysterious floating city, the psychic creation of the long-lost Rebel hero Cody Sunn-Childe, who abandoned his violent past after discovering his mystical power and built his City of Dreams as a refuge from the Galactic Civil War. Lando rejects Sunn-Childe's pacifism, insisting violence is sometimes necessary, and repairs the *Falcon* to leave. Before he can depart, an Imperial fleet under Captain Plikk breaks through the dimensional fabric and attacks the city, draining its power in the assault. Though Sunn-Childe could easily destroy the fleet, he holds to his pacifist beliefs and lets himself and his city be destroyed. Lando departs, leaving the Imperial fleet stranded in the other dimension as punishment.
title: Star Wars (1977) #46: The Dreams of Cody Sunn-Childe
